title: CNI Cybersecurity Controls
summary: Provides NIST-based controls and training paths for CNI sectors including government, financial services, healthcare, ICT, energy, critical industry, telecommunications, and transportation, with sector domains for governance, defence, cloud, third-party risk, incident management and audit.

theme_notes.cybersecurity.security_controls_framewor: Sector-specific cybersecurity controls for Bahrain’s critical national infrastructure.
theme_notes.cybersecurity.critical_infrastructure: Sector-specific cybersecurity controls for Bahrain CNI entities.
theme_notes.cybersecurity.incident_reporting: CNI controls include incident management expectations.

notes: Related instruments: Related to Baseline Cyber Security Controls and National Cybersecurity Risk Management Framework
